```javascript
function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

const names = ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'];
names.forEach(n => console.log(greet(n)));
```

```python
def fibonacci(n):
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(n):
        yield a
        a, b = b, a + b

print(list(fibonacci(10)))
```
